notes: core uses hijriMonth:8, hijriDay:1 — same type:hijri engine as ramadan/islamic-new-year, no manual date math needed.

Facts (Shaban = 8th hijri month, directly precedes Ramadan, Prophet's sunnah of frequent fasting in Shaban, Ramadan-entry announcement mechanism) verified against the same islamweb.net/binbaz.org.sa fatwa conventions already used elsewhere in the catalog.
Differentiation angle: frames Shaban explicitly as the last full month before Ramadan / an indirect Ramadan countdown, reciprocally linked to rajab-start, nisf-shaban, and ramadan.
Written in direct address (أنت) from the first draft per the house style rule.
